evals.prompt: I need to check what dependencies django version 4.2.0 has. Can you list them for me?
evals.expected_output: Should download django 4.2.0 sdist, extract PKG-INFO, and list all dependencies with version specifiers and environment markers

assertions.name: lists_asgiref
assertions.description: Output should list asgiref as a dependency

assertions.name: lists_sqlparse
assertions.description: Output should list sqlparse as a dependency

assertions.name: lists_multiple_dependencies
assertions.description: Should list at least 2 base dependencies

evals.prompt: What does the latest version of requests depend on?
evals.expected_output: Should download the latest requests sdist, extract PKG-INFO, and list all dependencies

assertions.name: lists_charset_normalizer
assertions.description: Output should list charset_normalizer as a dependency

assertions.name: lists_urllib3
assertions.description: Output should list urllib3 as a dependency

assertions.name: lists_certifi
assertions.description: Output should list certifi as a dependency

evals.prompt: Can you show me the dependencies for flask==2.3.0 and click==8.1.0?
evals.expected_output: Should process both packages, downloading each sdist, extracting PKG-INFO, and showing dependencies for each package separately

assertions.name: lists_both_packages
assertions.description: Output should include dependencies for both flask and click

assertions.name: lists_werkzeug
assertions.description: Should list Werkzeug as a flask dependency

assertions.name: lists_jinja2
assertions.description: Should list Jinja2 as a flask dependency

assertions.name: separates_packages
assertions.description: Should clearly separate or label dependencies for each package
